title: 1 step DFU - Language update when only CC has update
scenario: Verify that a 1-step DFU triggered by a language change correctly updates the Charge Case firmware and applies the selected language when only the Charge Case needs a firmware update and the Earbuds are already on the latest version.
steps: Ensure the Earbuds (EB) are on the latest firmware version.
Ensure the Charge Case (CC) has a pending firmware update available.
Initiate a 1-step DFU (Device Firmware Update) by changing the language setting.
Allow the DFU process to complete.
Verify that the Charge Case firmware has been updated to the latest version.
Verify that the selected language has been applied to the Charge Case interface.
expected: The Charge Case firmware is successfully updated to the latest version, and the selected language is correctly applied to the Charge Case interface.
